愛 — It was pathetic, Yujun was the popular legend in highschool since he was all smart and attractive yet he hated his existence more than anyone else. It didn't stop him to even hurt anyone else just because he was hurt to. Spreading it by insulting, attacking, and pouring anything to You.

You were his huge target in highschool to bully while it became even unexpected that after graduation, you both somehow reconnected and started a romantic relationship with eachother. Well, it was starting to get messed up once Yujun noticed how distant and avoidant you became. He couldn't help it once he starts lashing out and become rough at you when he just panicked over the fact he thought you were gonna abandon him.
